name: My Cincinnati Five Ways Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef, onions, and garlic.
2. Drain the fat.
3. Add spices, tomato sauce, cocoa powder, and vinegar to a pot.
4. Simmer on low heat for 1 to 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Cook spaghetti or other pasta according to package instructions, then drain.
6. Toss cooked spaghetti with 2 tbsp butter.
7. Fry onions in butter until crispy.
8. Reheat drained kidney beans in water and drain again before adding them to the chili.
